text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The atmosphere at Symboli Rudolf's long-awaited
debut is as charged as a real graded race, but she
only sees the pressure as an opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her back straight and head unbowed, she
makes her way to the track.
